data.body: Evidence for the 'make lint && make typecheck && make test' criterion: (1) locally, from the implementation worktree at commit 52d7a3dc1, 'make lint' reported 1022 files already formatted + ruff check clean, 'make typecheck' reported 'Success: no issues found in 326 source files', and the focused suites covering this change (tests/unit/test_coach_blocking_findings.py 10 passed, tests/unit/test_review_kernel.py, tests/unit/test_prompt_front_matter.py, tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py — 151 passed together, 2026-07-15) ran green; the full 'make test' over the combined tree ran 6012 passed with the only persistent failure being the pre-existing environment-dependent tests/unit/test_resolve_symbol_tool.py case (bug spherular-aberrant-hog, unrelated — fails identically on an untouched main checkout). (2) Authoritatively, this change landed as Gerrit change 708 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/708), which earned Verified +1 — CI's full build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions over exactly this diff — plus LLM-Review +1, and is MERGED on main (commit 52d7a3dc1 lineage).
